description_long: This is a modern bungalow with a flat roof and a clean, geometric design, featuring a mix of white and wood-textured exterior panels. The front facade is accented by a row of palm trees and a landscaped garden with flowering shrubs, while the rear includes a rectangular swimming pool surrounded by a paved patio. Large windows and sliding glass doors provide ample natural light and connect the indoor and outdoor spaces. The property is bordered by manicured hedges and a green lawn, with a driveway leading to a covered entrance. The building appears to have two levels, with the upper floor set back and partially open as a terrace. The overall aesthetic is minimalist and contemporary, emphasizing open space and integration with the surrounding landscape.
description: A modern, flat-roofed bungalow with wood and white paneling, landscaped gardens, and a pool, featuring large windows and a minimalist design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, palm-lined garden, and flowering shrubs along the boundary.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the pool area, patio, and a row of tall hedges along the driveway.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the upper terrace, green lawn, and the building's wood-paneled facade.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a clear look at the covered entrance, additional landscaping, and the poolside area.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows and sliding glass doors
